summary: AI and Data Engineer with experience developing enterprise AI chatbots, RAG architectures, and semantic search using different technologies. Passionate about building scalable AI solutions, solving complex problems, and continuously learning in fast-paced and international environments.

items.text: Mad for supercomputing is a course for baccalaureate students interested in STEM, organized by the Barcelona Supercomputing Center and Fundació Catalunya La Pedrera.

entries.title: Connecthink Innovation, S.L.
bullets: Development of enterprise AI chatbots for querying and managing large-scale datasets.
Implementation of RAG architectures using LlamaIndex, pgvector, LangGraph, and GraphRAG.
Integration with internal systems and optimization of semantic search and response quality.

entries.title: La Salle - URL
entries.text: University collaborator as a mathematics, algebra, calculus and Mathematical Fundamentals teacher assistant in the Artificial Intelligence degree

entries.title: Computer Engineering and Business and Management student
entries.subtitle: University of La Salle - URL
bullets: Strong academic focus combining software engineering, data, and business strategy.
High workload and rigorous program requiring strong discipline, adaptability, and continuous learning.

items.label: Awards/Activities:
items.text: Scholarship for women in engineering, Winner of the First Lego League
